summary:
Given the roots of two binary trees, root and subRoot, return true if subRoot appears as a subtree inside root.

A subtree of root consists of one of its nodes together with all of that node's descendants. The match must be exact: same shape and same values throughout.

examples.explanation: The node valued 4 in root, along with its children 1 and 2, forms a subtree identical to subRoot.
The candidate subtree rooted at 4 now has an extra node (0), so it no longer matches subRoot exactly.

constraints: The number of nodes in root is in the range [1, 2000].
The number of nodes in subRoot is in the range [1, 1000].
A subtree must include every descendant of the chosen node.
